title: Draft playbooks are not runnable
summary: Verify draft playbooks are blocked from procedure execution and guardrail enforcement.
preconditions: A playbook exists with status draft and otherwise valid playbook frontmatter.
steps: Attempt to resolve the draft playbook for procedure execution or guardrail enforcement through the playbook catalog/router.
expected: The catalog may list the draft playbook for review, but execution/enforcement routing rejects it because only active playbooks run or enforce.
